transient_shaping_spec.sustain_reduction: Apply -6dB to -12dB attenuation to tails in Layer 2 (Lead)
transient_shaping_spec.layer_sync: Align Kick-click with Snare-crack on the 2nd/4th beat (±1ms precision)
transient_shaping_spec.soft_clip: Apply Hard-Clipping to transients only (Parallel Bus) for 'Digital Bite'

components.soundscape: The physical environment (e.g., Sub-Arctic Industrial, Deep-Space Void)

semantic_core_l1.interaction_rule: E x C x S = Narrative_Fidelity
semantic_core_l1.stability_index: Must be > 0.85 for successful Hyperloop execution
